mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rgriffin(licenseType, rgriffinCompany, rgriffinBusinessName, rgriffinCategory, rgriffinWriteDate, rgriffinIssueDate, rgriffinExpire, rgriffinQuantity, rgriffinRgmsid, rgriffinPassword, rgriffinFilePath, requester, rgriffinContent, rgriffinRegistrant, salesManager, rgriffinRegistrationDate) VALUES(#{licenseTypeView}, #{rgriffinCompanyView}, #{rgriffinBusinessNameView}, #{rgriffinCategoryView}, #{rgriffinWriteDateView}, #{rgriffinIssueDateView}, #{rgriffinExpireView}, #{rgriffinQuantityView}, #{rgriffinRgmsidView}, #{rgriffinPasswordView}, #{rgriffinFilePathView}, #{requesterView}, #{rgriffinContent}, #{rgriffinRegistrant}, #{salesManagerView}, #{rgriffinRegistrationDate});
mapper.update: UPDATE rgriffin SET rgriffinCompany=#{rgriffinCompanyView}, rgriffinBusinessName=#{rgriffinBusinessNameView}, rgriffinWriteDate=#{rgriffinWriteDateView}, rgriffinIssueDate=#{rgriffinIssueDateView}, rgriffinExpire=#{rgriffinExpireView}, rgriffinQuantity=#{rgriffinQuantityView}, rgriffinRgmsid=#{rgriffinRgmsidView}, rgriffinPassword=#{rgriffinPasswordView}, rgriffinFilePath=#{rgriffinFilePathView}, requester=#{requesterView}, salesManager=#{salesManagerView}, rgriffinModifier=#{rgriffinModifier}, rgriffinModifiedDate=#{rgriffinModifiedDate} WHERE rgriffinKeyNum = #{rgriffinKeyNum};
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rgriffin WHERE rgriffinExpire != '무제한' AND STR_TO_DATE(rgriffinExpire, '%Y-%m-%d') AND maillYn = 'Y' BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL ${period} DAY);
SELECT * FROM rgriffin WHERE rgriffinExpire != '무제한' AND maillYn = 'Y' AND STR_TO_DATE(rgriffinExpire, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL ${period} DAY);
